prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约3574→3967→6780→5708→6293，整体呈后移趋势，2023年因省控线大幅下降（理科一本线485分，较2022年降30分）位次骤降至6780，2024年回升至5708，2025年又后移至6293；近3年波动区间约5700–6800名，2025年基准约6293名；本省理科/物理类计划2021–2025年分别为72→76→77→80→79人，2026年计划83人，较2025年扩招4人（约5.1%），扩招幅度有限，对竞争格局影响较小。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流A类高校；软科主榜2026年第22名，近年排名稳定在第21–22名，属国内顶尖高校梯队；2026年声誉评价偏负面（学伴事件遗留影响），但抖音热度排名第20（高热），短视频曝光量高，反映报考关注度仍处高位；2022–2024年曾出现投档线异常信号（陕西断档、四川理科调档线下降63分等），对考生心理有滞后影响；数学A+（王牌）、中国语言文学A、外国语言文学A、马克思主义理论A、控制科学与工程A、临床医学A-等19个A-及以上学科，学科实力雄厚，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等山东大学优势工科专业社会热度高热推荐；本省2026年普通高考总考生约37.79万人，较2025年（物理类17.33万+历史类11.24万≈28.57万）估算增长约32%，考生规模大幅增加，竞争显著加剧；山东大学位于山东省，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜；在云南省招生计划近年稳定在79–83人，占比极小，跨省报考受地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年小幅扩招（约5%）与本省考生大幅增长（约32%）的供需矛盾，扩招对位次的推后效应远不及考生增加带来的竞争加剧，预计2026年最低位次较2025年基准6293名前移约140名；预测最低位次约6434名（注：位次数字减小=更难进，此处因考生大增竞争加剧使位次前移），区间5934–6934名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 3574 → 3967 → 6780 → 5708 → 6293, showing an overall backward trend. In 2023, due to a significant drop in the provincial control line (science first-tier line 485 points, 30 points lower than 2022), the ranking sharply fell to 6780, rebounded to 5708 in 2024, and further moved back to 6293 in 2025. The fluctuation range in the past three years is about 5700–6800, with a baseline of approximately 6293 in 2025. The provincial science/physics enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 72 → 76 → 77 → 80 → 79, with a planned 83 in 2026, an increase of 4 (about 5.1%) compared to 2025, a limited expansion with minor impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class A university; ranked 22nd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings around 21st–22nd in recent years, belonging to the top domestic university tier. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative (lingering impact of the study partner incident), but Douyin popularity ranks 20th (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting sustained high application attention. From 2022 to 2024, there were abnormal signals in admission lines (e.g., a gap in Shaanxi, a 63-point drop in Sichuan science admission line), with lagging effects on candidate psychology. It has 19 A- or above disciplines, including A+ in Mathematics (flagship), A in Chinese Language and Literature, Foreign Languages and Literature, Marxist Theory, Control Science and Engineering, and A- in Clinical Medicine, with strong disciplinary strength attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Shandong University's advantageous engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly popular and recommended. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in the province is about 377,900, an estimated increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (physics category 173,300 + history category 112,400 ≈ 285,700), leading to a significant increase in competition. Shandong University is located in Shandong Province, not a local university, so there is no local enrollment preference. The enrollment plan in Yunnan Province has been stable at 79–83 in recent years, a very small proportion, with limited impact from cross-provincial application due to regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend in rankings, the small enrollment expansion in 2026 (about 5%), and the significant increase in provincial candidates (about 32%), the supply-demand contradiction means the expansion's effect on pushing rankings back is far less than the intensified competition from increased candidates. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will move forward by about 140 places compared to the 2025 baseline of 6293. The predicted minimum ranking is about 6434 (note: a smaller ranking number means harder to enter; here, due to increased competition from more candidates, the ranking moves forward), with a range of 5934–6934.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 6434, range 5934–6934. Candidates near the upper limit (6934) are advised to focus on Tier 2 with Tier 3 as safety; those near the lower limit (5934) can aim for Tier 1 flagship majors like Clinical Medicine, Computer Science and Technology, and Mathematics; Tier 2 majors like Electronic Information and Automation have strong disciplinary strength and high social popularity, suitable for mid-ranking candidates to apply steadily.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 655 → 734 → 603 → 750 → 1407. The fluctuation range from 2021 to 2024 was 603–750. In 2025, due to the reform of the examination model (new college entrance examination history category), the ranking sharply dropped to 1407, moving back about 657 places compared to 2024, which is a structural change rather than normal fluctuation. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 1407. The provincial enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category from 2021 to 2025 was 21 → 21 → 22 → 20 → 22 students, and the 2026 plan is 22 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class A university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it ranks 22nd, with stable rankings in recent years. The reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative (lingering impact of the 'study partner' incident), but it ranks 20th in Douyin popularity (high heat), indicating still high attention for applications. From 2022 to 2024, abnormal signals in admission scores mainly involved science subjects, with no obvious record of gaps in liberal arts. Disciplines such as Chinese Language and Literature (A), Foreign Languages and Literature (A), Marxist Theory (A), Law (A-), and Applied Economics (A-) highlight strong liberal arts capabilities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Socially popular majors include Law, Chinese Language/Literature, etc. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination students in the province is about 377,900. Based on the recent proportion of history category students at about 39%, the number of history category examinees is approximately 148,500, an increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (112,400), indicating a significant increase in the scale of examinees and intensified competition. Shandong University is located in Shandong Province, not a local university, so there is no local admission preference. The enrollment plan for liberal arts in Yunnan Province has been stable at 20–22 students in recent years, and cross-provincial applications are limited by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the structural change in 2025 rankings due to the new college entrance examination reform, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, and the significant increase in history category examinees in the province (about 32%), the intensified competition is expected to move the minimum ranking forward by about 50 places from the 2025 baseline of 1407. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1357, with a range of 1153–1561.
